title: Immediate Requirement Medical Officer at Baxter India International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Medical Officer at Baxter India International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Medical Officer looking for your next big career move? Baxter India International Enterprises in Rajkot offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Baxter India International Enterprises:
Baxter India International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Baxter India International Enterprises!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
